org.apache.dubbo.remoting.exchange

接口 ExchangeHandler

  • 所有超级接口:
    ChannelHandler, TelnetHandler
    所有已知实现类:
    ExchangeHandlerAdapter, ExchangeHandlerDispatcher

    public interface ExchangeHandler
extends ChannelHandler, TelnetHandler
    ExchangeHandler. (API, Prototype, ThreadSafe)

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 实例方法 抽象方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      CompletableFuture<Object> reply(ExchangeChannel channel, Object request)
      reply.

      • 从接口继承的方法 org.apache.dubbo.remoting.ChannelHandler

        caught, connected, disconnected, received, sent

      • 从接口继承的方法 org.apache.dubbo.remoting.telnet.TelnetHandler

        telnet

    • 方法详细资料

      • reply

        CompletableFuture<Object> reply(ExchangeChannel channel,
                                Object request)
                         throws RemotingException
        reply.

        request -
        返回:
        response
        抛出:
